# testing/utility/reflect.utility

> **Test Support Layer**

Generic reflection helpers for safe property access, type guards,
and HTTP header extraction.

## Remarks

Provides low-level building blocks consumed by higher-level test
utilities such as `getRegisteredTools` in
`mcp-server-introspection.utility.ts` and
`parseToolsListPayload` in `mcp-response.utility.ts`.
Every function performs defensive `typeof` / `null` checks so
callers never need to narrow `unknown` manually.

| Export                                              | Purpose                           |
| --------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------- |
| [getObjectProperty](functions/getObjectProperty.md) | Reflect-based property read       |
| [getStringProperty](functions/getStringProperty.md) | String-narrowing property read    |
| [getSessionId](functions/getSessionId.md)           | *(deprecated)* MCP session header |
| [toResponseBody](functions/toResponseBody.md)       | Object â†’ plain record             |
| [isFunctionValue](functions/isFunctionValue.md)     | `typeof` function guard           |

## Functions

| Function                                            | Description                                                                                                                             |
| --------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [getObjectProperty](functions/getObjectProperty.md) | Safely reads a property from an `unknown` value using [Reflect.get](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference). |
| [getStringProperty](functions/getStringProperty.md) | Reads a string property from an `unknown` value using reflection.                                                                       |
| [~~getSessionId~~](functions/getSessionId.md)       | Extracts the `Mcp-Session-Id` header from incoming HTTP headers.                                                                        |
| [toResponseBody](functions/toResponseBody.md)       | Converts an `unknown` value to a plain `Record<string, unknown>` via `Object.entries`.                                                  |
| [isFunctionValue](functions/isFunctionValue.md)     | Type guard that narrows an `unknown` value to a function signature.                                                                     |
